title.description: The name of the website displayed as the main heading.
title.notes: This is the brand name — do not translate.

comingSoon.description: Coming soon announcement shown below the site title.
comingSoon.notes: Short and punchy. Standard 'coming soon' phrase in the target language.

tagline.description: A brief teaser line shown below the coming soon text.
tagline.notes: Conveys excitement and anticipation. Adapt naturally to the target language.
